chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2658 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 04.02.2026. Mr. Waqas Asad Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ Learned counsel for the Petitioner states under instructions that the Petition is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
